name: unrelated_domain
description: Software version control spec vs wireless power patent. Zero domain overlap expected.
target_spec:
Version Control System Specification

This software system tracks changes to source code files using a directed acyclic graph of commits. Each commit stores a SHA-256 hash of file contents, author metadata, and a reference to parent commits. Branches allow parallel development workflows. Merge operations reconcile divergent commit histories. A repository stores all commits and objects in a compressed object database.

patent.title: Wireless power transfer with adaptive coil alignment
claims: 1. A wireless power transfer apparatus comprising a transmitter coil; a position sensor configured to detect a position of a receiver coil; and a controller configured to adjust a drive signal based on the detected position.
2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of magnetic field sensors.

expected_verdicts.rationale: coil, transmitter, wireless not in software spec
sensor, position detection not in software spec
drive signal, controller for wireless power not in software spec
